title: Maintenance playbook + outcome-tracking ledger (including null results)
context: M4 sustainability requires that the project can outlive its initial contributors. This task produces the maintenance playbook (how to triage issues, re-release with updated tooling, respond to Unicode/orthography updates, and handle community change-requests) and the public outcome-tracking ledger (adoption events and legibility findings, including null/mixed results). The honesty clause requires null/mixed legibility results to be recorded, not suppressed.
objective: Write and publish a maintenance playbook covering issue triage, tooling updates, Unicode/orthography changes, and community change-requests, plus a public outcome-tracking ledger recording adoption events and legibility findings (including null/mixed results).
acceptanceCriteria: Maintenance playbook covers: issue triage, re-building and re-releasing with updated tooling (fontmake/gftools/fontbakery), responding to Unicode/orthography updates, and handling community change-requests per the governance protocol.
Public outcome-tracking ledger records: all adoption events (upstream acceptance, document deployments, community usage) and any legibility validation findings.
Ledger includes null and mixed legibility results if any validation was conducted; the honesty clause (O8) is explicitly referenced.
Both documents are CC-BY-4.0 and versioned in the repository.
No identifiable personal data is included; contributor credit is consent-only.
Documents are structured so a new maintainer can act on them without context from the original team.
resources: PLAN.md (section 4: success metrics — O8 honesty clause)
output: A maintenance playbook and outcome-tracking ledger (both CC-BY-4.0) covering issue triage, tooling updates, community change-requests, adoption events, and legibility findings (including null results), merged into the repository.
